notes.body: June Daily Report budgets are live — open the 2065 sheet, scroll to the bottom for your June sales budget. DoorDash + UberEats promos baked in. Standing: Large soda only 30c more than Regular; Blackberry counter sign posted; Orientation Checklist with all new hires.
